basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 CEO, Project Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: CEO, Project Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) CEO, Project Office Assistant and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 03 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Engineering/Physics/Materials Science/Electronics/Photonics/Quantum Technologies, Master's/Bachelor's with exceptional experience, Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry/Synthetic Organic Chemistry, Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Product Design/Industrial Design/Design Engineering/Mechanical Engineering, Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Photonics/Optics/Applied Physics/Electrical Engineering, Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation/RF Engineering/Computer Engineering/Embedded Systems/Computer Science/IT, Bachelor's/Master's in Commerce/Finance/Accounting, Bachelor's degree in any discipline
qualification.details: Visiting Professor / Engineer / Scientist: Ph.D. in Engineering, Physics, Materials Science, Electronics, Photonics, Quantum Technologies, or related discipline or Master's with exceptional industry/research experience. Minimum 10-15 years experience. Organic Synthetic Chemist – Organic Gel Scientist: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry or Synthetic Organic Chemistry with at least one peer-reviewed publication and completed synthesis project. Product Development Manager – Scientific Product Design: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Product Design / Industrial Design / Design Engineering / Mechanical Engineering with at least one end-to-end project from concept to prototype. Optical Laser Circuit Design Specialist: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Photonics / Optics / Applied Physics / Electrical Engineering with at least one completed project in optical circuits/laser systems. Photonics Device Maker / Quantum Optical Systems Specialist: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Photonics / Optics / Applied Physics / Electrical Engineering with at least one completed project in optical sensing/photonic devices/quantum optics. PCB Design and Microwave/Antenna Engineer: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Electronics / Electrical / Instrumentation / RF Engineering with at least one fabricated and tested device PCB project. FPGA Systems and Instrumentation Engineer: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Electronics / Electrical / Computer Engineering / Embedded Systems with at least one functional FPGA-based device hardware system. Electronic Device Programming, Interfacing, and Wireless Electromagnetics Engineer: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Electronics / Instrumentation / Electrical / Embedded Systems with at least one project in device control/sensor interfacing/embedded systems/wireless circuits. AI/LLM Hardware Integration Engineer: Bachelor's/Master's/Ph.D. in Computer Science / Electronics / IT / Computer Engineering with at least one demonstrable project in local/personal LLM deployment. Chief Executive Officer (CEO): Bachelor's in Engineering or Master's in Science/Engineering/Management with 8-10 years experience in technology/innovation-driven organisations. Manager cum Accountant (Project Manager): Bachelor's or Master's in Commerce/Finance/Accounting with professional qualifications such as CA/CMA preferred and 5-10 years experience. Assistant Project Manager: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with 3-7 years experience in administrative/secretarial/office management roles. Project Office Assistant: Graduate (B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./B.C.A. or equivalent) with 0-3 years experience in office support roles.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Organic Synthetic Chemist – Organic Gel Scientist
Product Development Manager – Scientific Product Design
Photonics Device Maker / Quantum Optical Systems Specialist
Electronic Device Programming, Interfacing, and Wireless Electromagnetics Engineer

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Mandi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Mandi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Mandi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Mandi Various Technical and Administrative Positions is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies for various Technical and Administrative Positions announced by IIT Mandi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Mandi recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official IIT Mandi website.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IIT Mandi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for Assistant Project Manager?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Assistant Project Manager is a Bachelor's degree in any discipline with 3-7 years of experience in administrative roles.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for Project Office Assistant?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Office Assistant ranges from ₹10,000 to ₹30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection methods for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply, provided they meet the specified educational and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
